teachings.teaching: Jesus tells the disciples these things so they can have peace “in him.”
Suffering/pressure (“tribulation”) is a reality in the world, and followers should expect it.
Despite world troubles, believers should take courage and not be discouraged.
Courage is grounded in Jesus’ victory: he has conquered the world.

goals.goal: To reassure and encourage the audience to remain steadfast by cultivating peace in Jesus and courage in the face of worldly tribulation, based on his victory over the world.
